title: Learning Application and Research Center
content:
Learning Application and Research Center

Coursera

MENU

Thousands of Online Courses from the World’s Leading Universities and Companies

Our university has acquired a

Coursera Campus License

to enhance the digital competencies of our students and staff, promote continuous learning, and support their career development. This license provides

free access to over 1,000+ online courses

offered by prestigious universities such as Stanford, Yale, Michigan, Imperial College London, and global tech leaders like Google, IBM, Meta, and Amazon.

Strengthen their resumes with      certified courses tailored to their fields

Gain professional skills that      provide a competitive edge in internship and job applications

Experience flexible and      personalized learning at their own pace

Access content across a wide      range of subjects including technology, business, data science,      engineering, design, and more

For Academic and Administrative Staff:

Online learning opportunities      that support personal and professional development

Improve foreign language skills      and explore contemporary teaching methods

Stay up to date with current      content in areas such as educational technologies, leadership, project      management, and digital transformation

Enhance academic portfolios      with internationally recognized certificates

Globally Recognized Certificates

Upon successful completion of each course, participants receive

digital certificates of achievement

issued by Coursera. These certificates can be added to LinkedIn profiles and incorporated into academic or digital portfolios.

Support and Contact

For any questions regarding Coursera access and usage, please contact Learning Application and Research Center.
